raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a and b must be comparable",
    "a and b must support the greater than operator"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns True if a is greater than b",
    "returns False otherwise"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "a and b are of different types",
    "a and b are NaN or infinity",
    "a and b are equal"
  ]
}
```
